## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena to discuss SEO progress, technical issues, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Technical SEO issues are being addressed by Arena's engineering team, with a deadline set for next Friday](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [GrowthX is bringing in-house technical SEO experts to provide additional recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Consideration of testing blog content on a Webflow instance to compare performance with WordPress](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Recent traffic spike attributed to a similarly-named AI chatbot company, not Arena's content](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

## Topics

### Environmental Crisis in Brazil

  - [Massive fires in Amazon and Pantanal ecosystems causing severe air pollution](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)
  - [60-70% of Latin America affected by smoke cloud](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Climate change exacerbating the situation with lack of rainfall](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Significant impact on daily life: breathing difficulties, allergies, and visual pollution](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Paulo shared spreadsheet highlighting priority pages for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Paola to update content calendar spreadsheet with already optimized pages](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [New batch of refreshed email articles expected tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Arena's growth engineering team addressing Google-related problems (Core Web Vitals, JavaScript, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [GrowthX bringing in technical SEO experts for comprehensive audits](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Key issues identified: heading structure (H1s, H2s), site speed performance](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Full technical SEO report expected in 2-4 business days](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)

### CMS Considerations

  - [Discussion about potentially testing blog content on Webflow for performance comparison](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Arena recently moved from Webflow to WordPress for customization reasons](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [GrowthX seeing better results with Webflow for other clients](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

### Content Strategy and Partnerships

  - Consideration of translating content to Spanish and Portuguese (on hold for now)
  - [Potential partnership opportunity with Strapi, a similar front-end component company](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1477.0)
  - [GrowthX applying learnings from other clients (e.g., Ramp, Reddit) to Arena's account](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Paulo to notify Jimmy via Slack about the exact date for technical SEO fixes completion](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide actionable technical SEO recommendations after internal evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
  - [Arena to consider allocating more developers to address technical issues based on GrowthX's guidance](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Paola to update the content calendar spreadsheet with already optimized pages](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Team to evaluate the feasibility and potential benefits of testing blog content on a Webflow instance](https://fathom.video/share/afpaGjh1rsobTsPz3BBmJuCFka7ygyp_?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
